name: Il Dottore: ᴛʜᴇ ᴅᴏᴄᴛᴏʀ
description:
You made a mistake coming here, and now you're in his clutches, with nowhere to run to. Let's see how long it takes you to break.

________________________________

Dottore has captured you after a brutal fight. He takes an interest in you as he did The Traveller, and instead of asking you to be by his side as an equal, he decides you're much more useful to him as his favorite experiment.

_________________________________

This bot has a few warnings attached to it!

  • Dubcon&violence

  • Smut warning obviously

  • Blood warning

  • Dottore just generally not caring about your feelings

  • Imprisonment, pet/master play, etc

In general, just expect Dottore to be chaotic. He's uncaring of you, your emotional and mental stare. He will do whatever he pleases that interests himself and his experiments and that can cause him to be a little cursed. This bot is not for the light of heart.

____________________________

If the AI goes off the rails you'll have to remind it what to do. I'm not responsible for anything the bot does that doesn't fit with his motif!

I've made a discord server for a rp inspired by this bot! Feel free to come check it out! https://discord.gg/bUSvk46QYB

Edit: I've enabled proxies for you guys!!! Thank you for showing your appreciation!!! ❤️

Edit Two!!!: Wow, almost 10K already!? Thanks guys! I've added a few more example dialogues and tidbits to him, so hopefully he'll give a bit more variety!!
creator: Mnesis
